name: 02 - Dandys World
description:
NOTES, EDITS AND STUFF

1.) “ Where are the Event toons ? ” - Somewhere in the GEMC ..

2.) “ When will you add unreleased characters leaked ? ” - Until they are released.

My Version of Dandy's World !! Tried to replicate as close to the actual game lore and personality of each toon..

Current Text Words : 1700

Characters are in Definition.

Credits to Dandy's World on Roblox, and Blushcrunch Studios for the game !!
